zh.lifeSummary: 當William Marshal於1214年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可辛加姆時，他的父親John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham45歲，母親Aline Rie29歲。他於1234年與Elizabeth de Ferrers在英國英格蘭諾福爾可辛加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1265年8月在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Marshal于1214年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可辛加姆时，他的父亲John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham45岁，母亲Aline Rie29岁。他于1234年与Elizabeth de Ferrers在英国英格兰諾福爾可辛加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1265年8月在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Marshal was born in 1214, in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, was 45 and his mother, Aline Rie, was 29. He married Elizabeth de Ferrers in 1234, in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in August 1265, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Marshal est né en 1214, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Aline Rie, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Ferrers en 1234, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en août 1265, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Marshal 1214 in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham 45 und seine Mutter Aline Rie 29. Er hat 1234 in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im August 1265 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Marshal è nato il nel 1214 nel Hingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Aline Rie, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Ferrers nel 1234, nel Hingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel agosto 1265, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Marshalが1214年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムで生まれた時，父John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hinghamは45歳，母Aline Rieは29歳であった。1234年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムでElizabeth de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1265年8月にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Marshal(이)가 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Aline Rie(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 잉함에서 Elizabeth de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1265년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Marshal nasceu em 1214, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Aline Rie, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Ferrers em 1234, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1265, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Marshal родился в 1214 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline Rie, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Ferrers в 1234 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер август 1265 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Marshal nació en 1214, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Aline Rie, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Ferrers en 1234, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en agosto de 1265, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
